file.content:
name: kody-watch

on:
  schedule:
    # Every 10 minutes. Each agent's own cron in agent.json still gates whether
    # that specific agent executes on any given invocation, so daily agents stay
    # daily — this cadence is driven by job-manager's need for a responsive queue.
    - cron: '*/10 * * * *'
  workflow_dispatch:
    inputs:
      dry_run:
        type: boolean
        default: false
        description: 'Run without executing actions'
      agents:
        type: string
        default: ''
        description: 'Comma-separated agent names to run (functional,infra,analytics,system-test). Default: all'

concurrency:
  group: kody-watch
  cancel-in-progress: false

permissions:
  issues: write
  contents: read
  actions: write

jobs:
  watch:
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
    timeout-minutes: 120
    steps:
      - uses: actions/checkout@v4
        with:
          fetch-depth: 0
          persist-credentials: true

      - uses: pnpm/action-setup@v4
        with:
          version: 9
      - uses: actions/setup-node@v4
        with:
          node-version: 22
          cache: pnpm

      - name: Install Claude Code
        if: hashFiles('.kody/watch/agents/*/agent.json') != ''
        run: npm install -g @anthropic-ai/claude-code

      - name: Install Kody Engine
        run: npm install -g @kody-ade/engine

      - name: Install project dependencies
        if: hashFiles('.kody/watch/agents/*/agent.json') != ''
        run: pnpm install --frozen-lockfile

      - name: Install LiteLLM proxy
        if: hashFiles('.kody/watch/agents/*/agent.json') != ''
        run: pip install 'litellm[proxy]' prisma && python -m prisma py fetch

      - name: Export project secrets
        env:
          ALL_SECRETS: ${{ toJSON(secrets) }}
        run: |
          echo "$ALL_SECRETS" | jq -r 'to_entries[] | select(.key | test("^(GITHUB_TOKEN)$") | not) | @json' | while IFS= read -r entry; do
            KEY=$(echo "$entry" | jq -r '.key')
            VALUE=$(echo "$entry" | jq -r '.value')
            DELIM="KODY_EOF_${KEY}"
            echo "${KEY}<<${DELIM}" >> $GITHUB_ENV
            echo "${VALUE}" >> $GITHUB_ENV
            echo "${DELIM}" >> $GITHUB_ENV
          done

      - name: Get Playwright version
        id: playwright-version
        run: echo "version=$(pnpm exec playwright --version | head -1)" >> $GITHUB_OUTPUT

      - name: Cache Playwright browsers
        uses: actions/cache@v4
        id: playwright-cache
        with:
          path: ~/.cache/ms-playwright
          key: ${{ runner.os }}-playwright-${{ steps.playwright-version.outputs.version }}

      - name: Install Playwright browsers
        if: hashFiles('.kody/watch/agents/*/agent.json') != '' && steps.playwright-cache.outputs.cache-hit != 'true'
        run: pnpm exec playwright install --with-deps chromium

      - name: Run Kody Watch
        env:
          # Prefer PROJECT_TOKEN (user PAT) so agent-authored comments appear as
          # a human user, which lets @kody comment-triggers posted by agents
          # (e.g. job-manager) bypass the bot filter in kody.yml's parse job.
          GH_TOKEN: ${{ secrets.PROJECT_TOKEN || github.token }}
          REPO: ${{ github.repository }}
          WATCH_DIGEST_ISSUE: ${{ vars.WATCH_DIGEST_ISSUE }}
          WATCH_DIGEST_ISSUE_FUNCTIONAL: ${{ vars.WATCH_DIGEST_ISSUE_FUNCTIONAL }}
          WATCH_DIGEST_ISSUE_INFRA: ${{ vars.WATCH_DIGEST_ISSUE_INFRA }}
          WATCH_DIGEST_ISSUE_ANALYTICS: ${{ vars.WATCH_DIGEST_ISSUE_ANALYTICS }}
          PREVIEW_URL: ${{ vars.PREVIEW_URL }}
          NEXT_PUBLIC_SERVER_URL: ${{ secrets.NEXT_PUBLIC_SERVER_URL || 'http://localhost:3000' }}
          DRY_RUN: ${{ inputs.dry_run || 'false' }}
          AGENTS: ${{ inputs.agents }}
        run: |
          ARGS="watch"
          [ "$DRY_RUN" = "true" ] && ARGS="$ARGS --dry-run"
          [ -n "$AGENTS" ] && ARGS="$ARGS --agent $AGENTS"
          kody-engine $ARGS

      - name: Upload watch memory artifacts
        if: always()
        uses: actions/upload-artifact@v4
        continue-on-error: true
        with:
          name: watch-memory-${{ github.run_id }}
          path: |
            .kody/memory/watch-*.json
            .kody/watch/agent-logs/*.log
          retention-days: 7

1	# Drop this file at .github/workflows/kody.yml in your repo.
2	#
3	# Two triggers, two modes:
4	#   - issue_comment / workflow_dispatch with issue_number → `kody ci`
5	#     (the @kody issue/PR automation flow)
6	#   - workflow_dispatch with sessionId                    → `kody chat`
7	#     (dashboard-driven Gemini chat session)
8	#
9	# All orchestration lives in the kody npm package; future capabilities ship
10	# via `npm publish`, not by editing this file.
11	#
12	# Required repo secrets: at least one model provider key (e.g. MINIMAX_API_KEY,
13	# ANTHROPIC_API_KEY). kody reads any *_API_KEY secret automatically via
14	# toJSON(secrets) — no need to list them here.
15	#
16	# Recommended: KODY_TOKEN secret — a fine-grained PAT or GitHub App token
17	# with `repo` + `read:org` + `workflow` scopes. Without it, kody's
18	# commits/PR-creation still work via github.token, but three things degrade:
19	#   1. PR body updates fail with "token lacks read:org scope" (cosmetic).
20	#   2. Pushes from kody won't trigger downstream workflows.
21	#   3. Any commit that modifies `.github/workflows/*` is REJECTED by
22	#      GitHub — the default GITHUB_TOKEN can't touch workflow files.
23	# Set KODY_TOKEN in repo Settings → Secrets → Actions.
24	
25	name: kody
26	
27	on:
28	  workflow_dispatch:
29	    inputs:
30	      issue_number:
31	        description: 'GitHub issue number (agent mode)'
32	        type: string
33	        default: ''
34	      sessionId:
35	        description: 'Chat session ID (chat mode, from Kody-Dashboard)'
36	        type: string
37	        default: ''
38	      message:
39	        description: 'Initial chat message (optional)'
40	        type: string
41	        default: ''
42	      model:
43	        description: 'Model override (optional, e.g. anthropic/claude-haiku-4-5-20251001)'
44	        type: string
45	        default: ''
46	      dashboardUrl:
47	        description: 'Dashboard event ingest URL with inline ?token=... (chat mode)'
48	        type: string
49	        default: ''
50	  issue_comment:
51	    types: [created]
52	
53	jobs:
54	  run:
55	    if: >-
56	      ${{ github.event_name == 'workflow_dispatch' ||
57	          (github.event_name == 'issue_comment' &&
58	            contains(github.event.comment.body, '@kody') &&
59	            github.event.comment.user.login != 'kody-bot' &&
60	            github.event.comment.user.type != 'Bot') }}
61	    runs-on: ubuntu-latest

74	      pr_number: ${{ steps.parse.outputs.pr_number }}
75	      feedback: ${{ steps.parse.outputs.feedback }}
76	      ci_run_id: ${{ steps.parse.outputs.ci_run_id }}
77	      ticket_id: ${{ steps.parse.outputs.ticket_id }}
78	      prd_file: ${{ steps.parse.outputs.prd_file }}
79	      dry_run: ${{ steps.parse.outputs.dry_run }}
80	      bump: ${{ steps.parse.outputs.bump }}
81	      finalize: ${{ steps.parse.outputs.finalize }}
82	      no_publish: ${{ steps.parse.outputs.no_publish }}
83	      no_notify: ${{ steps.parse.outputs.no_notify }}
84	      revert_target: ${{ steps.parse.outputs.revert_target }}
85	      valid: ${{ steps.parse.outputs.valid }}
86	    steps:
87	      - uses: actions/setup-node@v4
88	        with:
89	          node-version: 22
90	
91	      - name: Install Kody Engine
92	        run: npm install -g @kody-ade/engine
93	
94	      - name: Validate author
95	        id: safety
96	        run: |
97	          ALLOWED="COLLABORATOR MEMBER OWNER"
98	          ASSOC="${{ github.event.comment.author_association }}"
99	          if echo "$ALLOWED" | grep -qw "$ASSOC"; then
100	            echo "valid=true" >> $GITHUB_OUTPUT
101	          else
102	            echo "valid=false" >> $GITHUB_OUTPUT
103	            echo "reason=Author association '$ASSOC' not allowed" >> $GITHUB_OUTPUT
104	          fi
105	
106	      - name: Add reaction
107	        if: steps.safety.outputs.valid == 'true'
108	        uses: actions/github-script@v7
109	        continue-on-error: true
110	        with:
111	          script: |
112	            await github.rest.reactions.createForIssueComment({
113	              owner: context.repo.owner,
114	              repo: context.repo.repo,
115	              comment_id: context.payload.comment.id,
116	              content: 'eyes'
117	            })
118	
119	      - name: Parse inputs
120	        if: steps.safety.outputs.valid == 'true'
121	        id: parse
122	        env:
123	          GH_TOKEN: ${{ secrets.GITHUB_TOKEN }}
124	          GH_REPO: ${{ github.repository }}
125	          COMMENT_BODY: ${{ github.event.comment.body }}
126	          ISSUE_NUMBER: ${{ github.event.issue.number }}
127	          ISSUE_IS_PR: ${{ github.event.issue.pull_request && 'true' || '' }}
128	          TRIGGER_TYPE: comment
129	          COMMENT_AUTHOR_ASSOC: ${{ github.event.comment.author_association }}
130	        run: kody-engine ci-parse
131	
132	  # ─── Orchestrate ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
133	  orchestrate:
134	    # always() lets this job evaluate its if-condition even when the `parse`
135	    # dependency was skipped (which it is for workflow_dispatch and
136	    # pull_request_review, since parse's own if-condition is gated on
137	    # issue_comment). Without always(), GitHub Actions inherits the skipped
138	    # status from the needs dependency regardless of what this job's if says.
139	    if: >-
140	      always() && (
141	        github.event_name == 'workflow_dispatch' ||
142	        github.event_name == 'pull_request_review' ||
143	        (github.event_name == 'issue_comment' && needs.parse.outputs.valid == 'true')
144	      )
145	    needs:
146	      - parse
147	    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
148	    timeout-minutes: 120
149	    services:
150	      mongodb:
151	        image: mongo:7
152	        ports:
153	          - 27017:27017
154	        options: >-
155	          --health-cmd "mongosh --eval 'db.runCommand({ ping: 1 })'"
156	          --health-interval 10s
157	          --health-timeout 5s
158	          --health-retries 5
159	    steps:
160	      - name: Generate App token
161	        id: app-token
162	        if: vars.KODY_APP_ID != ''
163	        uses: actions/create-github-app-token@v1
164	        with:
165	          app-id: ${{ vars.KODY_APP_ID }}
166	          private-key: ${{ secrets.APP_PRIVATE_KEY }}
167	          repositories: ${{ github.event.repository.name }}
168	
169	      - uses: actions/checkout@v4
170	        with:
171	          fetch-depth: 0
172	          persist-credentials: true
173	          token: ${{ secrets.GITHUB_TOKEN }}
174	
175	      - name: Checkout PR branch (for fix/rerun/review on PRs)
176	        if: github.event.issue.pull_request && (needs.parse.outputs.mode == 'fix' || needs.parse.outputs.mode == 'fix-ci' || needs.parse.outputs.mode == 'rerun' || needs.parse.outputs.mode == 'review' || needs.parse.outputs.mode == 'resolve')
177	        env:
178	          GH_TOKEN: ${{ steps.app-token.outputs.token || secrets.GITHUB_TOKEN }}
179	        run: |
180	          PR_NUM="${{ github.event.issue.number }}"
181	          PR_BRANCH=$(gh pr view "$PR_NUM" --json headRefName -q '.headRefName')
182	          echo "Checking out PR branch: $PR_BRANCH"
183	          git checkout "$PR_BRANCH"
184	          git pull origin "$PR_BRANCH"
185	
186	      - uses: pnpm/action-setup@v4
187	        with:
188	          version: latest
189	      - uses: actions/setup-node@v4
190	        with:
191	          node-version: 22
192	          cache: pnpm
193	
194	      - run: pnpm install --frozen-lockfile
195	
196	      - name: Install Kody Engine
197	        run: npm install -g @kody-ade/engine
198	
199	      - name: Install Claude Code CLI
200	        run: npm install -g @anthropic-ai/claude-code
201	
202	      - name: Install LiteLLM proxy
203	        run: pip install 'litellm[proxy]' prisma && python -m prisma py fetch
204	
205	      - name: Get Playwright version
206	        run: echo "version=$(pnpm exec playwright --version | head -1)" >> $GITHUB_OUTPUT
207	
208	      - name: Cache Playwright browsers
209	        uses: actions/cache@v4
210	        with:
211	          path: ~/.cache/ms-playwright
212	          key: ${{ runner.os }}-playwright-${{ steps.playwright-version.outputs.version }}
213	
214	      - name: Install Playwright browsers
215	        run: pnpm exec playwright install --with-deps chromium
216	
217	      - name: Configure git
218	        run: |
219	          git config user.email "41898282+github-actions[bot]@users.noreply.github.com"
220	          git config user.name "github-actions[bot]"
221	
222	      - name: Export project secrets
223	        env:
224	          ALL_SECRETS: ${{ toJSON(secrets) }}
225	        run: |
226	          # Override MCP_ENABLED from secrets — Payload requires DEFAULT_TENANT_SLUG when MCP is on
227	          echo "MCP_ENABLED=false" >> $GITHUB_ENV
228	          echo "$ALL_SECRETS" | jq -r 'to_entries[] | select(.key | test("^(GITHUB_TOKEN)$") | not) | @json' | while IFS= read -r entry; do
229	            KEY=$(echo "$entry" | jq -r '.key')
230	            VALUE=$(echo "$entry" | jq -r '.value')
231	            DELIM="KODY_EOF_${KEY}"
232	            echo "${KEY}<<${DELIM}" >> $GITHUB_ENV
233	            echo "${VALUE}" >> $GITHUB_ENV
234	            echo "${DELIM}" >> $GITHUB_ENV
235	          done
236	
237	      - name: Warm up Next.js build cache
238	        run: NODE_OPTIONS='--max-old-space-size=6144' npx next build
239	        timeout-minutes: 20
240	
241	      - name: Run Kody pipeline
242	        env:
243	          GH_TOKEN: ${{ secrets.PROJECT_TOKEN || secrets.GITHUB_TOKEN }}
244	          TASK_ID: ${{ github.event.inputs.task_id || needs.parse.outputs.task_id }}
245	          MODE: ${{ github.event.inputs.mode || needs.parse.outputs.mode || 'full' }}
246	          FROM_STAGE: ${{ github.event.inputs.from_stage || needs.parse.outputs.from_stage }}
247	          ISSUE_NUMBER: ${{ github.event.inputs.issue_number || needs.parse.outputs.issue_number }}
248	          PR_NUMBER: ${{ needs.parse.outputs.pr_number }}
249	          FEEDBACK: ${{ github.event.inputs.feedback || needs.parse.outputs.feedback }}
250	          COMPLEXITY: ${{ needs.parse.outputs.complexity }}
251	          CI_RUN_ID: ${{ needs.parse.outputs.ci_run_id }}
252	          TICKET_ID: ${{ needs.parse.outputs.ticket_id }}
253	          PRD_FILE: ${{ needs.parse.outputs.prd_file }}
254	          DRY_RUN: ${{ github.event.inputs.dry_run || needs.parse.outputs.dry_run || 'false' }}
255	          AUTO_MODE: ${{ github.event.inputs.auto_mode }}
256	          BUMP: ${{ needs.parse.outputs.bump }}
257	          FINALIZE: ${{ github.event.inputs.finalize || needs.parse.outputs.finalize }}
258	          NO_PUBLISH: ${{ needs.parse.outputs.no_publish }}
259	          NO_NOTIFY: ${{ needs.parse.outputs.no_notify }}
260	          REVERT_TARGET: ${{ needs.parse.outputs.revert_target }}
261	          RUN-URL: ${{ github.server_url }}/${{ github.repository }}/actions/runs/${{ github.run_id }}
262	        run: |
263	          if [ "$MODE" = "release" ]; then
264	            echo "Running release..."
265	            ARGS=""
266	            [ "$FINALIZE" = "true" ] && ARGS="$ARGS --finalize"
267	            [ -n "$BUMP" ] && ARGS="$ARGS --bump=$BUMP"
268	            [ "$NO_PUBLISH" = "true" ] && ARGS="$ARGS --no-publish"
269	            [ "$NO_NOTIFY" = "true" ] && ARGS="$ARGS --no-notify"
270	            [ "$DRY_RUN" = "true" ] && ARGS="$ARGS --dry-run"
271	            [ -n "$ISSUE_NUMBER" ] && ARGS="$ARGS --issue-number $ISSUE_NUMBER"
272	            kody-engine release $ARGS
273	          elif [ "$MODE" = "revert" ]; then
274	            echo "Running revert..."
275	            ARGS=""
276	            [ -n "$REVERT_TARGET" ] && ARGS="$ARGS --target $REVERT_TARGET"
277	            [ -n "$ISSUE_NUMBER" ] && ARGS="$ARGS --issue-number $ISSUE_NUMBER"
278	            [ "$DRY_RUN" = "true" ] && ARGS="$ARGS --dry-run"
279	            kody-engine revert $ARGS
280	          elif [ "$MODE" = "bootstrap" ]; then
281	            echo "Running bootstrap..."
282	            kody-engine bootstrap
283	          elif [ "$MODE" = "taskify" ]; then
284	            echo "Running taskify..."
285	            ARGS=""
286	            [ -n "$TICKET_ID" ] && ARGS="$ARGS --ticket $TICKET_ID"
287	            [ -n "$PRD_FILE" ] && ARGS="$ARGS --file $PRD_FILE"
288	            [ -n "$ISSUE_NUMBER" ] && ARGS="$ARGS --issue-number $ISSUE_NUMBER"
289	            [ -n "$TASK_ID" ] && ARGS="$ARGS --task-id $TASK_ID"
290	            kody-engine taskify $ARGS
291	          else
292	            CMD="run"
293	            [ "$MODE" = "rerun" ] && CMD="rerun"
294	            [ "$MODE" = "fix" ] && CMD="fix"
295	            [ "$MODE" = "fix-ci" ] && CMD="fix-ci"
296	            [ "$MODE" = "review" ] && CMD="review"
297	            [ "$MODE" = "resolve" ] && CMD="resolve"
298	            [ "$MODE" = "status" ] && CMD="status"
299	            [ "$MODE" = "hotfix" ] && CMD="hotfix"
300	            ARGS="--issue-number $ISSUE_NUMBER"
301	            [ -n "$TASK_ID" ] && ARGS="$ARGS --task-id $TASK_ID"
302	            [ -n "$PR_NUMBER" ] && ARGS="$ARGS --pr-number $PR_NUMBER"
303	            [ -n "$FROM_STAGE" ] && ARGS="$ARGS --from $FROM_STAGE"
304	            [ -n "$COMPLEXITY" ] && ARGS="$ARGS --complexity $COMPLEXITY"
305	            # FEEDBACK is also passed via env var (avoids shell escaping issues)
306	            [ -n "$FEEDBACK" ] && ARGS="$ARGS --feedback \"$FEEDBACK\""
307	            [ "$DRY_RUN" = "true" ] && ARGS="$ARGS --dry-run"

file.content:
# Drop this file at .github/workflows/kody.yml in your repo.
#
# Two triggers, two modes:
#   - issue_comment / workflow_dispatch with issue_number → `kody ci`
#     (the @kody issue/PR automation flow)
#   - workflow_dispatch with sessionId                    → `kody chat`
#     (dashboard-driven Gemini chat session)
#
# All orchestration lives in the kody npm package; future capabilities ship
# via `npm publish`, not by editing this file.
#
# Required repo secrets: at least one model provider key (e.g. MINIMAX_API_KEY,
# ANTHROPIC_API_KEY). kody reads any *_API_KEY secret automatically via
# toJSON(secrets) — no need to list them here.
#
# Recommended: KODY_TOKEN secret — a fine-grained PAT or GitHub App token
# with `repo` + `read:org` + `workflow` scopes. Without it, kody's
# commits/PR-creation still work via github.token, but three things degrade:
#   1. PR body updates fail with "token lacks read:org scope" (cosmetic).
#   2. Pushes from kody won't trigger downstream workflows.
#   3. Any commit that modifies `.github/workflows/*` is REJECTED by
#      GitHub — the default GITHUB_TOKEN can't touch workflow files.
# Set KODY_TOKEN in repo Settings → Secrets → Actions.

name: kody

on:
  workflow_dispatch:
    inputs:
      issue_number:
        description: 'GitHub issue number (agent mode)'
        type: string
        default: ''
      sessionId:
        description: 'Chat session ID (chat mode, from Kody-Dashboard)'
        type: string
        default: ''
      message:
        description: 'Initial chat message (optional)'
        type: string
        default: ''
      model:
        description: 'Model override (optional, e.g. anthropic/claude-haiku-4-5-20251001)'
        type: string
        default: ''
      dashboardUrl:
        description: 'Dashboard event ingest URL with inline ?token=... (chat mode)'
        type: string
        default: ''
  issue_comment:
    types: [created]

jobs:
  run:
    if: >-
      ${{ github.event_name == 'workflow_dispatch' ||
          (github.event_name == 'issue_comment' &&
            contains(github.event.comment.body, '@kody') &&
            github.event.comment.user.login != 'kody-bot' &&
            github.event.comment.user.type != 'Bot') }}
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
<<<<<<< HEAD
    timeout-minutes: 360
    concurrency:
      group: kody-${{ inputs.sessionId || inputs.issue_number || github.event.issue.number || github.sha }}
      cancel-in-progress: false
=======
    timeout-minutes: 5
    outputs:
      task_id: ${{ steps.parse.outputs.task_id }}
      mode: ${{ steps.parse.outputs.mode }}
      from_stage: ${{ steps.parse.outputs.from_stage }}
      issue_number: ${{ steps.parse.outputs.issue_number }}
      pr_number: ${{ steps.parse.outputs.pr_number }}
      feedback: ${{ steps.parse.outputs.feedback }}
      ci_run_id: ${{ steps.parse.outputs.ci_run_id }}
      ticket_id: ${{ steps.parse.outputs.ticket_id }}
      prd_file: ${{ steps.parse.outputs.prd_file }}
      dry_run: ${{ steps.parse.outputs.dry_run }}
      bump: ${{ steps.parse.outputs.bump }}
      finalize: ${{ steps.parse.outputs.finalize }}
      no_publish: ${{ steps.parse.outputs.no_publish }}
      no_notify: ${{ steps.parse.outputs.no_notify }}
      revert_target: ${{ steps.parse.outputs.revert_target }}
      valid: ${{ steps.parse.outputs.valid }}
    steps:
      - uses: actions/setup-node@v4
        with:
          node-version: 22

      - name: Install Kody Engine
        run: npm install -g @kody-ade/engine

      - name: Validate author
        id: safety
        run: |
          ALLOWED="COLLABORATOR MEMBER OWNER"
          ASSOC="${{ github.event.comment.author_association }}"
          if echo "$ALLOWED" | grep -qw "$ASSOC"; then
            echo "valid=true" >> $GITHUB_OUTPUT
          else
            echo "valid=false" >> $GITHUB_OUTPUT
            echo "reason=Author association '$ASSOC' not allowed" >> $GITHUB_OUTPUT
          fi

      - name: Add reaction
        if: steps.safety.outputs.valid == 'true'
        uses: actions/github-script@v7
        continue-on-error: true
        with:
          script: |
            await github.rest.reactions.createForIssueComment({
              owner: context.repo.owner,
              repo: context.repo.repo,
              comment_id: context.payload.comment.id,
              content: 'eyes'
            })

      - name: Parse inputs
        if: steps.safety.outputs.valid == 'true'
        id: parse
        env:
          GH_TOKEN: ${{ secrets.GITHUB_TOKEN }}
          GH_REPO: ${{ github.repository }}
          COMMENT_BODY: ${{ github.event.comment.body }}
          ISSUE_NUMBER: ${{ github.event.issue.number }}
          ISSUE_IS_PR: ${{ github.event.issue.pull_request && 'true' || '' }}
          TRIGGER_TYPE: comment
          COMMENT_AUTHOR_ASSOC: ${{ github.event.comment.author_association }}
        run: kody-engine ci-parse

  # ─── Orchestrate ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
  orchestrate:
    # always() lets this job evaluate its if-condition even when the `parse`
    # dependency was skipped (which it is for workflow_dispatch and
    # pull_request_review, since parse's own if-condition is gated on
    # issue_comment). Without always(), GitHub Actions inherits the skipped
    # status from the needs dependency regardless of what this job's if says.
    if: >-
      always() && (
        github.event_name == 'workflow_dispatch' ||
        github.event_name == 'pull_request_review' ||
        (github.event_name == 'issue_comment' && needs.parse.outputs.valid == 'true')
      )
    needs:
      - parse
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
    timeout-minutes: 120
    services:
      mongodb:
        image: mongo:7
        ports:
          - 27017:27017
        options: >-
          --health-cmd "mongosh --eval 'db.runCommand({ ping: 1 })'"
          --health-interval 10s
          --health-timeout 5s
          --health-retries 5
    steps:
      - name: Generate App token
        id: app-token
        if: vars.KODY_APP_ID != ''
        uses: actions/create-github-app-token@v1
        with:
          app-id: ${{ vars.KODY_APP_ID }}
          private-key: ${{ secrets.APP_PRIVATE_KEY }}
          repositories: ${{ github.event.repository.name }}

      - uses: actions/checkout@v4
        with:
          fetch-depth: 0
          persist-credentials: true
          token: ${{ secrets.GITHUB_TOKEN }}

      - name: Checkout PR branch (for fix/rerun/review on PRs)
        if: github.event.issue.pull_request && (needs.parse.outputs.mode == 'fix' || needs.parse.outputs.mode == 'fix-ci' || needs.parse.outputs.mode == 'rerun' || needs.parse.outputs.mode == 'review' || needs.parse.outputs.mode == 'resolve')
        env:
          GH_TOKEN: ${{ steps.app-token.outputs.token || secrets.GITHUB_TOKEN }}
        run: |
          PR_NUM="${{ github.event.issue.number }}"
          PR_BRANCH=$(gh pr view "$PR_NUM" --json headRefName -q '.headRefName')
          echo "Checking out PR branch: $PR_BRANCH"
          git checkout "$PR_BRANCH"
          git pull origin "$PR_BRANCH"

      - uses: pnpm/action-setup@v4
        with:
          version: latest
      - uses: actions/setup-node@v4
        with:
          node-version: 22
          cache: pnpm

      - run: pnpm install --frozen-lockfile

      - name: Install Kody Engine
        run: npm install -g @kody-ade/engine

      - name: Install Claude Code CLI
        run: npm install -g @anthropic-ai/claude-code

      - name: Install LiteLLM proxy
        run: pip install 'litellm[proxy]' prisma && python -m prisma py fetch

      - name: Get Playwright version
        run: echo "version=$(pnpm exec playwright --version | head -1)" >> $GITHUB_OUTPUT

      - name: Cache Playwright browsers
        uses: actions/cache@v4
        with:
          path: ~/.cache/ms-playwright
          key: ${{ runner.os }}-playwright-${{ steps.playwright-version.outputs.version }}

      - name: Install Playwright browsers
        run: pnpm exec playwright install --with-deps chromium

      - name: Configure git
        run: |
          git config user.email "41898282+github-actions[bot]@users.noreply.github.com"
          git config user.name "github-actions[bot]"

      - name: Export project secrets
        env:
          ALL_SECRETS: ${{ toJSON(secrets) }}
        run: |
          # Override MCP_ENABLED from secrets — Payload requires DEFAULT_TENANT_SLUG when MCP is on
          echo "MCP_ENABLED=false" >> $GITHUB_ENV
          echo "$ALL_SECRETS" | jq -r 'to_entries[] | select(.key | test("^(GITHUB_TOKEN)$") | not) | @json' | while IFS= read -r entry; do
            KEY=$(echo "$entry" | jq -r '.key')
            VALUE=$(echo "$entry" | jq -r '.value')
            DELIM="KODY_EOF_${KEY}"
            echo "${KEY}<<${DELIM}" >> $GITHUB_ENV
            echo "${VALUE}" >> $GITHUB_ENV
            echo "${DELIM}" >> $GITHUB_ENV
          done

      - name: Warm up Next.js build cache
        run: NODE_OPTIONS='--max-old-space-size=6144' npx next build
        timeout-minutes: 20

      - name: Run Kody pipeline
        env:
          GH_TOKEN: ${{ secrets.PROJECT_TOKEN || secrets.GITHUB_TOKEN }}
          TASK_ID: ${{ github.event.inputs.task_id || needs.parse.outputs.task_id }}
          MODE: ${{ github.event.inputs.mode || needs.parse.outputs.mode || 'full' }}
          FROM_STAGE: ${{ github.event.inputs.from_stage || needs.parse.outputs.from_stage }}
          ISSUE_NUMBER: ${{ github.event.inputs.issue_number || needs.parse.outputs.issue_number }}
          PR_NUMBER: ${{ needs.parse.outputs.pr_number }}
          FEEDBACK: ${{ github.event.inputs.feedback || needs.parse.outputs.feedback }}
          COMPLEXITY: ${{ needs.parse.outputs.complexity }}
          CI_RUN_ID: ${{ needs.parse.outputs.ci_run_id }}
          TICKET_ID: ${{ needs.parse.outputs.ticket_id }}
          PRD_FILE: ${{ needs.parse.outputs.prd_file }}
          DRY_RUN: ${{ github.event.inputs.dry_run || needs.parse.outputs.dry_run || 'false' }}
          AUTO_MODE: ${{ github.event.inputs.auto_mode }}
          BUMP: ${{ needs.parse.outputs.bump }}
          FINALIZE: ${{ github.event.inputs.finalize || needs.parse.outputs.finalize }}
          NO_PUBLISH: ${{ needs.parse.outputs.no_publish }}
          NO_NOTIFY: ${{ needs.parse.outputs.no_notify }}
          REVERT_TARGET: ${{ needs.parse.outputs.revert_target }}
          RUN-URL: ${{ github.server_url }}/${{ github.repository }}/actions/runs/${{ github.run_id }}
        run: |
          if [ "$MODE" = "release" ]; then
            echo "Running release..."
            ARGS=""
            [ "$FINALIZE" = "true" ] && ARGS="$ARGS --finalize"
            [ -n "$BUMP" ] && ARGS="$ARGS --bump=$BUMP"
            [ "$NO_PUBLISH" = "true" ] && ARGS="$ARGS --no-publish"
            [ "$NO_NOTIFY" = "true" ] && ARGS="$ARGS --no-notify"
            [ "$DRY_RUN" = "true" ] && ARGS="$ARGS --dry-run"
            [ -n "$ISSUE_NUMBER" ] && ARGS="$ARGS --issue-number $ISSUE_NUMBER"
            kody-engine release $ARGS
          elif [ "$MODE" = "revert" ]; then
            echo "Running revert..."
            ARGS=""
            [ -n "$REVERT_TARGET" ] && ARGS="$ARGS --target $REVERT_TARGET"
            [ -n "$ISSUE_NUMBER" ] && ARGS="$ARGS --issue-number $ISSUE_NUMBER"
            [ "$DRY_RUN" = "true" ] && ARGS="$ARGS --dry-run"
            kody-engine revert $ARGS
          elif [ "$MODE" = "bootstrap" ]; then
            echo "Running bootstrap..."
            kody-engine bootstrap
          elif [ "$MODE" = "taskify" ]; then
            echo "Running taskify..."
            ARGS=""
            [ -n "$TICKET_ID" ] && ARGS="$ARGS --ticket $TICKET_ID"
            [ -n "$PRD_FILE" ] && ARGS="$ARGS --file $PRD_FILE"
            [ -n "$ISSUE_NUMBER" ] && ARGS="$ARGS --issue-number $ISSUE_NUMBER"
            [ -n "$TASK_ID" ] && ARGS="$ARGS --task-id $TASK_ID"
            kody-engine taskify $ARGS
          else
            CMD="run"
            [ "$MODE" = "rerun" ] && CMD="rerun"
            [ "$MODE" = "fix" ] && CMD="fix"
            [ "$MODE" = "fix-ci" ] && CMD="fix-ci"
            [ "$MODE" = "review" ] && CMD="review"
            [ "$MODE" = "resolve" ] && CMD="resolve"
            [ "$MODE" = "status" ] && CMD="status"
            [ "$MODE" = "hotfix" ] && CMD="hotfix"
            ARGS="--issue-number $ISSUE_NUMBER"
            [ -n "$TASK_ID" ] && ARGS="$ARGS --task-id $TASK_ID"
            [ -n "$PR_NUMBER" ] && ARGS="$ARGS --pr-number $PR_NUMBER"
            [ -n "$FROM_STAGE" ] && ARGS="$ARGS --from $FROM_STAGE"
            [ -n "$COMPLEXITY" ] && ARGS="$ARGS --complexity $COMPLEXITY"
            # FEEDBACK is also passed via env var (avoids shell escaping issues)
            [ -n "$FEEDBACK" ] && ARGS="$ARGS --feedback \"$FEEDBACK\""
            [ "$DRY_RUN" = "true" ] && ARGS="$ARGS --dry-run"
            [ "$AUTO_MODE" = "true" ] && ARGS="$ARGS --auto-mode"
            kody-engine $CMD $ARGS
          fi

      - name: Pipeline summary
        if: always()
        run: |
          TASK_ID="${{ github.event.inputs.task_id || needs.parse.outputs.task_id }}"
          STATUS_FILE=".kody/tasks/${TASK_ID}/status.json"
          if [ -f "$STATUS_FILE" ]; then
            STATE=$(jq -r '.state' "$STATUS_FILE")
            ICON="❌"
            [ "$STATE" = "completed" ] && ICON="✅"
            echo "## ${ICON} Kody Pipeline: \`${TASK_ID}\`" >> $GITHUB_STEP_SUMMARY
            echo "" >> $GITHUB_STEP_SUMMARY
            echo "**Status:** ${STATE}" >> $GITHUB_STEP_SUMMARY
            echo "" >> $GITHUB_STEP_SUMMARY
            echo "| Stage | State |" >> $GITHUB_STEP_SUMMARY
            echo "|-------|-------|" >> $GITHUB_STEP_SUMMARY
            for stage in taskify plan build verify review review-fix ship; do
              SSTATE=$(jq -r ".stages[\"$stage\"].state // \"—\"" "$STATUS_FILE")
              case "$SSTATE" in
                completed) SICON="✅" ;;
                failed)    SICON="❌" ;;
                timeout)   SICON="⏱" ;;
                running)   SICON="▶️" ;;
                *)         SICON="○" ;;
              esac
              echo "| ${stage} | ${SICON} ${SSTATE} |" >> $GITHUB_STEP_SUMMARY
            done
          fi

      - name: Upload artifacts
        if: always()
        uses: actions/upload-artifact@v4
        continue-on-error: true
        with:
          name: kody-tasks-${{ github.event.inputs.task_id || needs.parse.outputs.task_id }}
          path: .kody/tasks/
          retention-days: 3

  # ─── Close Issue on PR Merge ────────────────────────────────────────────────
  close-issue-on-merge:
    if: >-
      github.event_name == 'pull_request' &&
      github.event.pull_request.merged == true
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
    permissions:
      issues: write
    steps:
      - name: Generate App token
        id: app-token
        if: vars.KODY_APP_ID != ''
        uses: actions/create-github-app-token@v1
        with:
          app-id: ${{ vars.KODY_APP_ID }}
          private-key: ${{ secrets.APP_PRIVATE_KEY }}
          repositories: ${{ github.event.repository.name }}

      - name: Close linked issue
        uses: actions/github-script@v7
        with:
          github-token: ${{ steps.app-token.outputs.token || secrets.GITHUB_TOKEN }}
          script: |
            // Extract issue number from branch name (e.g. "42-feature-name")
            const branch = context.payload.pull_request.head.ref;
            const match = branch.match(/^(\d+)-/);
            if (!match) return;
            const issueNumber = parseInt(match[1], 10);

            // Verify the issue exists and is open
            try {
              const { data: issue } = await github.rest.issues.get({
                owner: context.repo.owner,
                repo: context.repo.repo,
                issue_number: issueNumber,
              });
              if (issue.state === 'closed') return;
              if (issue.pull_request) return; // Skip if it's a PR, not an issue

              await github.rest.issues.update({
                owner: context.repo.owner,
                repo: context.repo.repo,
                issue_number: issueNumber,
                state: 'closed',
                state_reason: 'completed',
              });
              core.info(`Closed issue #${issueNumber} after PR #${context.payload.pull_request.number} was merged`);
            } catch (e) {
              core.warning(`Could not close issue #${issueNumber}: ${e.message}`);
            }

  # ─── Error Notifications ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────
  notify-parse-error:
    if: >-
      github.event_name == 'issue_comment' &&
      needs.parse.outputs.valid != 'true' &&
      (contains(github.event.comment.body, '@kody') || contains(github.event.comment.body, '/kody'))
    needs: [parse]
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
    steps:
      - uses: actions/github-script@v7
        with:
          script: |
            await github.rest.issues.createComment({
              owner: context.repo.owner,
              repo: context.repo.repo,
              issue_number: context.issue.number,

  notify-orchestrate-error:

    needs: [orchestrate]
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
    steps:
      - uses: actions/github-script@v7
        with:
          script: |
            const issueNumber = Number('${{ github.event.inputs.issue_number || needs.parse.outputs.issue_number || 0 }}');
            if (issueNumber > 0) {
              await github.rest.issues.createComment({
                owner: context.repo.owner,
                repo: context.repo.repo,
                issue_number: issueNumber,
                body: `❌ Pipeline failed. [View logs](${context.serverUrl}/${context.repo.owner}/${context.repo.repo}/actions/runs/${context.runId})`

  fix-ci-trigger:
    if: >-
      github.event_name == 'workflow_run' &&
      github.event.workflow_run.conclusion == 'failure' &&

    permissions:

      contents: write

          token: ${{ secrets.KODY_TOKEN || github.token }}

      - uses: actions/setup-node@v4
        with:
          node-version: 22

      - name: Write pip cache key for LiteLLM
        run: echo "litellm[proxy]" > .kody-pip-requirements.txt

      - uses: actions/setup-python@v5
        with:
          python-version: '3.12'
          cache: 'pip'
          cache-dependency-path: .kody-pip-requirements.txt

      - env:
          ALL_SECRETS: ${{ toJSON(secrets) }}
          SESSION_ID: ${{ inputs.sessionId }}
          INIT_MESSAGE: ${{ inputs.message }}
          MODEL: ${{ inputs.model }}
          DASHBOARD_URL: ${{ inputs.dashboardUrl }}
        run: |
          if [ -n "$SESSION_ID" ]; then
            npx -y -p @kody-ade/kody-engine@latest kody chat
          else
            npx -y -p @kody-ade/kody-engine@latest kody ci
          fi

{
  "$schema": "https://raw.githubusercontent.com/aharonyaircohen/Kody-Engine-Lite/main/kody.config.schema.json",
  "quality": {
    "typecheck": "pnpm typecheck",
    "lint": "pnpm lint",
    "lintFix": "pnpm lint:fix",
    "formatFix": "pnpm format",
    "testUnit": "pnpm test:unit"
  },
  "git": {
    "defaultBranch": "dev"
  },
  "github": {
    "owner": "A-Guy-educ",
    "repo": "A-Guy"
  },
  "agent": {
<<<<<<< HEAD
    "model": "minimax/MiniMax-M2.7-highspeed",
=======
>>>>>>> origin/main
    "modelMap": {
      "cheap": "minimax/MiniMax-M2.7-highspeed",
      "mid": "minimax/MiniMax-M2.7-highspeed",
      "strong": "minimax/MiniMax-M2.7-highspeed"
    },
    "budgets": {
      "taskify": { "maxTurns": 900, "maxBudgetUsd": 45.0 },
      "plan": { "maxTurns": 900, "maxBudgetUsd": 30.0 },
      "build": { "maxTurns": 3000, "maxBudgetUsd": 150.0 },
      "verify": { "maxTurns": 600, "maxBudgetUsd": 15.0 },
      "review": { "maxTurns": 900, "maxBudgetUsd": 30.0 },
      "review-fix": { "maxTurns": 1800, "maxBudgetUsd": 90.0 },
      "ship": { "maxTurns": 600, "maxBudgetUsd": 15.0 }
    }
  },
  "release": {
    "releaseBranch": "main",
    "versionFiles": ["package.json"],
    "notifyCommand": "NOTIFY_RESULT=always NOTIFY_VERSION=$VERSION pnpm tsx scripts/kody/notify.ts --agent release-publisher --channels slack --when always --color good --title \"🚀 A-Guy v$VERSION released\" --body \"Release $VERSION finalized — https://github.com/A-Guy-educ/A-Guy/releases/tag/v$VERSION\"",
    "e2eCommand": "USE_MONGO_SERVICE=true DATABASE_URL=mongodb://localhost:27017/test NEXT_PUBLIC_SERVER_URL=http://localhost:3000 SKIP_BUILD=true pnpm exec playwright test --config=playwright.e2e-gate.config.ts",
    "timeoutMs": 1800000
  },
  "watch": {
    "enabled": true,
    "model": "minimax/MiniMax-M2.7-highspeed"
  },
  "timeouts": {
    "taskify": 18000,
    "plan": 18000,
    "build": 72000,
    "verify": 9000,
    "review": 18000,
    "review-fix": 36000,
    "ship": 7200
  },
  "devServer": {
    "command": "pnpm dev",
    "url": "http://localhost:3000",
    "readyPattern": "Ready in|compiled|started server|Local:|localhost:|\u2713 Ready",
    "readyTimeout": 180,
    "env": [
      "AI_BASE_URL",
      "AI_KEY",
      "AI_MODEL",
      "BLOB_READ_WRITE_TOKEN",
      "BRAIN_AUTH_KEY",
      "CRON_SECRET",
      "DATABASE_URL",
      "DATABASE_URL_ATLAS",
      "FIGMA_API_KEY",
      "GEMINI_API_KEY",
      "GROQ_API_KEY",
      "MINIMAX_API_KEY",
      "NEXT_PUBLIC_SERVER_URL",
      "OPENAI_API_KEY",
      "PAYLOAD_SECRET",
      "SLACK_WEBHOOK_URL",
      "SLACK_WEBHOOK_URL_DEV"
    ]
  }
}

issue_comment:
    types: [created]

jobs:
  run:
    if: >-
      ${{ github.event_name == 'workflow_dispatch' ||
          (github.event_name == 'issue_comment' &&
            contains(github.event.comment.body, '@kody') &&
            github.event.comment.user.login != 'kody-bot' &&
            github.event.comment.user.type != 'Bot') }}
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
<<<<<<< HEAD
    timeout-minutes: 360
    concurrency:
      group: kody-${{ inputs.sessionId || inputs.issue_number || github.event.issue.number || github.sha }}
      cancel-in-progress: false
=======
    timeout-minutes: 5
    outputs:
      task_id: ${{ steps.parse.outputs.task_id }}
      mode: ${{ steps.parse.outputs.mode }}
      from_stage: ${{ steps.parse.outputs.from_stage }}
      issue_number: ${{ steps.parse.outputs.issue_number }}
      pr_number: ${{ steps.parse.outputs.pr_number }}
      feedback: ${{ steps.parse.outputs.feedback }}
      ci_run_id: ${{ steps.parse.outputs.ci_run_id }}
      ticket_id: ${{ steps.parse.outputs.ticket_id }}
      prd_file: ${{ steps.parse.outputs.prd_file }}
      dry_run: ${{ steps.parse.outputs.dry_run }}
      bump: ${{ steps.parse.outputs.bump }}
      finalize: ${{ steps.parse.outputs.finalize }}
      no_publish: ${{ steps.parse.outputs.no_publish }}
      no_notify: ${{ steps.parse.outputs.no_notify }}
      revert_target: ${{ steps.parse.outputs.revert_target }}
      valid: ${{ steps.parse.outputs.valid }}
    steps:
      - uses: actions/setup-node@v4
        with:
          node-version: 22

      - name: Install Kody Engine
        run: npm install -g @kody-ade/engine

      - name: Validate author
        id: safety
        run: |
          ALLOWED="COLLABORATOR MEMBER OWNER"
          ASSOC="${{ github.event.comment.author_association }}"
          if echo "$ALLOWED" | grep -qw "$ASSOC"; then
            echo "valid=true" >> $GITHUB_OUTPUT
          else
            echo "valid=false" >> $GITHUB_OUTPUT
            echo "reason=Author association '$ASSOC' not allowed" >> $GITHUB_OUTPUT
          fi

      - name: Add reaction
        if: steps.safety.outputs.valid == 'true'
        uses: actions/github-script@v7
        continue-on-error: true
        with:
          script: |
            await github.rest.reactions.createForIssueComment({
              owner: context.repo.owner,
              repo: context.repo.repo,
              comment_id: context.payload.comment.id,
              content: 'eyes'
            })

      - name: Parse inputs
        if: steps.safety.outputs.valid == 'true'
        id: parse
        env:
          GH_TOKEN: ${{ secrets.GITHUB_TOKEN }}
          GH_REPO: ${{ github.repository }}
          COMMENT_BODY: ${{ github.event.comment.body }}
          ISSUE_NUMBER: ${{ github.event.issue.number }}
          ISSUE_IS_PR: ${{ github.event.issue.pull_request && 'true' || '' }}
          TRIGGER_TYPE: comment
          COMMENT_AUTHOR_ASSOC: ${{ github.event.comment.author_association }}
        run: kody-engine ci-parse

  # ─── Orchestrate ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
  orchestrate:
    # always() lets this job evaluate its if-condition even when the `parse`
    # dependency was skipped (which it is for workflow_dispatch and
    # pull_request_review, since parse's own if-condition is gated on
    # issue_comment). Without always(), GitHub Actions inherits the skipped
    # status from the needs dependency regardless of what this job's if says.
    if: >-
      always() && (
        github.event_name == 'workflow_dispatch' ||
        github.event_name == 'pull_request_review' ||
        (github.event_name == 'issue_comment' && needs.parse.outputs.valid == 'true')
      )
    needs:
      - parse
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
    timeout-minutes: 120
    services:

# Drop this file at .github/workflows/kody.yml in your repo.
#
# Two triggers, two modes:
#   - issue_comment / workflow_dispatch with issue_number → `kody ci`
#     (the @kody issue/PR automation flow)
#   - workflow_dispatch with sessionId                    → `kody chat`
#     (dashboard-driven Gemini chat session)
#
# All orchestration lives in the kody npm package; future capabilities ship
# via `npm publish`, not by editing this file.
#
# Required repo secrets: at least one model provider key (e.g. MINIMAX_API_KEY,
# ANTHROPIC_API_KEY). kody reads any *_API_KEY secret automatically via
# toJSON(secrets) — no need to list them here.
#
# Recommended: KODY_TOKEN secret — a fine-grained PAT or GitHub App token
# with `repo` + `read:org` + `workflow` scopes. Without it, kody's
# commits/PR-creation still work via github.token, but three things degrade:
#   1. PR body updates fail with "token lacks read:org scope" (cosmetic).
#   2. Pushes from kody won't trigger downstream workflows.
#   3. Any commit that modifies `.github/workflows/*` is REJECTED by
#      GitHub — the default GITHUB_TOKEN can't touch workflow files.
# Set KODY_TOKEN in repo Settings → Secrets → Actions.

name: kody

on:
  workflow_dispatch:
    inputs:
      issue_number:
        description: 'GitHub issue number (agent mode)'
        type: string
        default: ''
      sessionId:
        description: 'Chat session ID (chat mode, from Kody-Dashboard)'
        type: string
        default: ''
      message:
        description: 'Initial chat message (optional)'
        type: string
        default: ''
      model:
        description: 'Model override (optional, e.g. anthropic/claude-haiku-4-5-20251001)'
        type: string
        default: ''
      dashboardUrl:
        description: 'Dashboard event ingest URL with inline ?token=... (chat mode)'
        type: string
        default: ''
  issue_comment:
    types: [created]

jobs:
  run:
    if: >-
      ${{ github.event_name == 'workflow_dispatch' ||
          (github.event_name == 'issue_comment' &&
            contains(github.event.comment.body, '@kody') &&
            github.event.comment.user.login != 'kody-bot' &&
            github.event.comment.user.type != 'Bot') }}
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
<<<<<<< HEAD

=======
    timeout-minutes: 5
    outputs:
      task_id: ${{ steps.parse.outputs.task_id }}
      mode: ${{ steps.parse.outputs.mode }}
      from_stage: ${{ steps.parse.outputs.from_stage }}
      issue_number: ${{ steps.parse.outputs.issue_number }}
      pr_number: ${{ steps.parse.outputs.pr_number }}
      feedback: ${{ steps.parse.outputs.feedback }}
      ci_run_id: ${{ steps.parse.outputs.ci_run_id }}
      ticket_id: ${{ steps.parse.outputs.ticket_id }}
      prd_file: ${{ steps.parse.outputs.prd_file }}
      dry_run: ${{ steps.parse.outputs.dry_run }}
      bump: ${{ steps.parse.outputs.bump }}
      finalize: ${{ steps.parse.outputs.finalize }}
      no_publish: ${{ steps.parse.outputs.no_publish }}
      no_notify: ${{ steps.parse.outputs.no_notify }}
      revert_target: ${{ steps.parse.outputs.revert_target }}
      valid: ${{ steps.parse.outputs.valid }}
    steps:
      - uses: actions/setup-node@v4
        with:
          node-version: 22

      - name: Install Kody Engine
        run: npm install -g @kody-ade/engine

      - name: Validate author
        id: safety
        run: |
          ALLOWED="COLLABORATOR MEMBER OWNER"
          ASSOC="${{ github.event.comment.author_association }}"
          if echo "$ALLOWED" | grep -qw "$ASSOC"; then
            echo "valid=true" >> $GITHUB_OUTPUT
          else
            echo "valid=false" >> $GITHUB_OUTPUT
            echo "reason=Author association '$ASSOC' not allowed" >> $GITHUB_OUTPUT
          fi

      - name: Add reaction
        if: steps.safety.outputs.valid == 'true'
        uses: actions/github-script@v7
        continue-on-error: true
        with:
          script: |
            await github.rest.reactions.createForIssueComment({
              owner: context.repo.owner,
              repo: context.repo.repo,
              comment_id: context.payload.comment.id,
              content: 'eyes'
            })

      - name: Parse inputs
        if: steps.safety.outputs.valid == 'true'
        id: parse
        env:
          GH_TOKEN: ${{ secrets.GITHUB_TOKEN }}
          GH_REPO: ${{ github.repository }}
          COMMENT_BODY: ${{ github.event.comment.body }}
          ISSUE_NUMBER: ${{ github.event.issue.number }}
          ISSUE_IS_PR: ${{ github.event.issue.pull_request && 'true' || '' }}
          TRIGGER_TYPE: comment
          COMMENT_AUTHOR_ASSOC: ${{ github.event.comment.author_association }}
        run: kody-engine ci-parse

  # ─── Orchestrate ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
  orchestrate:
    # always() lets this job evaluate its if-condition even when the `parse`
    # dependency was skipped (which it is for workflow_dispatch and
    # pull_request_review, since parse's own if-condition is gated on
    # issue_comment). Without always(), GitHub Actions inherits the skipped
    # status from the needs dependency regardless of what this job's if says.
    if: >-
      always() && (
        github.event_name == 'workflow_dispatch' ||
        github.event_name == 'pull_request_review' ||
        (github.event_name == 'issue_comment' && needs.parse.outputs.valid == 'true')
      )
    needs:
      - parse
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
    timeout-minutes: 120
    services:
      mongodb:
        image: mongo:7
        ports:
          - 27017:27017
        options: >-
          --health-cmd "mongosh --eval 'db.runCommand({ ping: 1 })'"
          --health-interval 10s
          --health-timeout 5s
          --health-retries 5
    steps:
      - name: Generate App token
        id: app-token
        if: vars.KODY_APP_ID != ''
        uses: actions/create-github-app-token@v1
        with:
          app-id: ${{ vars.KODY_APP_ID }}
          private-key: ${{ secrets.APP_PRIVATE_KEY }}
          repositories: ${{ github.event.repository.name }}

      - uses: actions/checkout@v4
        with:
          fetch-depth: 0
          persist-credentials: true
          token: ${{ secrets.GITHUB_TOKEN }}

      - name: Checkout PR branch (for fix/rerun/review on PRs)
        if: github.event.issue.pull_request && (needs.parse.outputs.mode == 'fix' || needs.parse.outputs.mode == 'fix-ci' || needs.parse.outputs.mode == 'rerun' || needs.parse.outputs.mode == 'review' || needs.parse.outputs.mode == 'resolve')
        env:
          GH_TOKEN: ${{ steps.app-token.outputs.token || secrets.GITHUB_TOKEN }}
        run: |
          PR_NUM="${{ github.event.issue.number }}"
          PR_BRANCH=$(gh pr view "$PR_NUM" --json headRefName -q '.headRefName')
          echo "Checking out PR branch: $PR_BRANCH"
          git checkout "$PR_BRANCH"
          git pull origin "$PR_BRANCH"

      - uses: pnpm/action-setup@v4
        with:
          version: latest
      - uses: actions/setup-node@v4
        with:
          node-version: 22
          cache: pnpm

      - run: pnpm install --frozen-lockfile

      - name: Install Kody Engine
        run: npm install -g @kody-ade/engine

      - name: Install Claude Code CLI
        run: npm install -g @anthropic-ai/claude-code

      - name: Install LiteLLM proxy
        run: pip install 'litellm[proxy]' prisma && python -m prisma py fetch

      - name: Get Playwright version
        run: echo "version=$(pnpm exec playwright --version | head -1)" >> $GITHUB_OUTPUT

      - name: Cache Playwright browsers
        uses: actions/cache@v4
        with:
          path: ~/.cache/ms-playwright
          key: ${{ runner.os }}-playwright-${{ steps.playwright-version.outputs.version }}

      - name: Install Playwright browsers
        run: pnpm exec playwright install --with-deps chromium

      - name: Configure git
        run: |
          git config user.email "41898282+github-actions[bot]@users.noreply.github.com"
          git config user.name "github-actions[bot]"

      - name: Export project secrets
        env:
          ALL_SECRETS: ${{ toJSON(secrets) }}
        run: |
          # Override MCP_ENABLED from secrets — Payload requires DEFAULT_TENANT_SLUG when MCP is on
          echo "MCP_ENABLED=false" >> $GITHUB_ENV
          echo "$ALL_SECRETS" | jq -r 'to_entries[] | select(.key | test("^(GITHUB_TOKEN)$") | not) | @json' | while IFS= read -r entry; do
            KEY=$(echo "$entry" | jq -r '.key')
            VALUE=$(echo "$entry" | jq -r '.value')
            DELIM="KODY_EOF_${KEY}"
            echo "${KEY}<<${DELIM}" >> $GITHUB_ENV
            echo "${VALUE}" >> $GITHUB_ENV
            echo "${DELIM}" >> $GITHUB_ENV
          done

      - name: Warm up Next.js build cache
        run: NODE_OPTIONS='--max-old-space-size=6144' npx next build
        timeout-minutes: 20

      - name: Run Kody pipeline
        env:
          GH_TOKEN: ${{ secrets.PROJECT_TOKEN || secrets.GITHUB_TOKEN }}
          TASK_ID: ${{ github.event.inputs.task_id || needs.parse.outputs.task_id }}
          MODE: ${{ github.event.inputs.mode || needs.parse.outputs.mode || 'full' }}
          FROM_STAGE: ${{ github.event.inputs.from_stage || needs.parse.outputs.from_stage }}
          ISSUE_NUMBER: ${{ github.event.inputs.issue_number || needs.parse.outputs.issue_number }}
          PR_NUMBER: ${{ needs.parse.outputs.pr_number }}
          FEEDBACK: ${{ github.event.inputs.feedback || needs.parse.outputs.feedback }}
          COMPLEXITY: ${{ needs.parse.outputs.complexity }}
          CI_RUN_ID: ${{ needs.parse.outputs.ci_run_id }}
          TICKET_ID: ${{ needs.parse.outputs.ticket_id }}
          PRD_FILE: ${{ needs.parse.outputs.prd_file }}
          DRY_RUN: ${{ github.event.inputs.dry_run || needs.parse.outputs.dry_run || 'false' }}
          AUTO_MODE: ${{ github.event.inputs.auto_mode }}
          BUMP: ${{ needs.parse.outputs.bump }}
          FINALIZE: ${{ github.event.inputs.finalize || needs.parse.outputs.finalize }}
          NO_PUBLISH: ${{ needs.parse.outputs.no_publish }}
          NO_NOTIFY: ${{ needs.parse.outputs.no_notify }}
          REVERT_TARGET: ${{ needs.parse.outputs.revert_target }}
          RUN-URL: ${{ github.server_url }}/${{ github.repository }}/actions/runs/${{ github.run_id }}
        run: |
          if [ "$MODE" = "release" ]; then
            echo "Running release..."
            ARGS=""
            [ "$FINALIZE" = "true" ] && ARGS="$ARGS --finalize"
            [ -n "$BUMP" ] && ARGS="$ARGS --bump=$BUMP"
            [ "$NO_PUBLISH" = "true" ] && ARGS="$ARGS --no-publish"
            [ "$NO_NOTIFY" = "true" ] && ARGS="$ARGS --no-notify"
            [ "$DRY_RUN" = "true" ] && ARGS="$ARGS --dry-run"
            [ -n "$ISSUE_NUMBER" ] && ARGS="$ARGS --issue-number $ISSUE_NUMBER"
            kody-engine release $ARGS
          elif [ "$MODE" = "revert" ]; then
            echo "Running revert..."
            ARGS=""
            [ -n "$REVERT_TARGET" ] && ARGS="$ARGS --target $REVERT_TARGET"
            [ -n "$ISSUE_NUMBER" ] && ARGS="$ARGS --issue-number $ISSUE_NUMBER"
            [ "$DRY_RUN" = "true" ] && ARGS="$ARGS --dry-run"
            kody-engine revert $ARGS
          elif [ "$MODE" = "bootstrap" ]; then
            echo "Running bootstrap..."
            kody-engine bootstrap
          elif [ "$MODE" = "taskify" ]; then
            echo "Running taskify..."
            ARGS=""
            [ -n "$TICKET_ID" ] && ARGS="$ARGS --ticket $TICKET_ID"
            [ -n "$PRD_FILE" ] && ARGS="$ARGS --file $PRD_FILE"
            [ -n "$ISSUE_NUMBER" ] && ARGS="$ARGS --issue-number $ISSUE_NUMBER"
            [ -n "$TASK_ID" ] && ARGS="$ARGS --task-id $TASK_ID"
            kody-engine taskify $ARGS
          else
            CMD="run"
            [ "$MODE" = "rerun" ] && CMD="rerun"
            [ "$MODE" = "fix" ] && CMD="fix"
            [ "$MODE" = "fix-ci" ] && CMD="fix-ci"
            [ "$MODE" = "review" ] && CMD="review"
            [ "$MODE" = "resolve" ] && CMD="resolve"
            [ "$MODE" = "status" ] && CMD="status"
            [ "$MODE" = "hotfix" ] && CMD="hotfix"
            ARGS="--issue-number $ISSUE_NUMBER"
            [ -n "$TASK_ID" ] && ARGS="$ARGS --task-id $TASK_ID"
            [ -n "$PR_NUMBER" ] && ARGS="$ARGS --pr-number $PR_NUMBER"
            [ -n "$FROM_STAGE" ] && ARGS="$ARGS --from $FROM_STAGE"
            [ -n "$COMPLEXITY" ] && ARGS="$ARGS --complexity $COMPLEXITY"
            # FEEDBACK is also passed via env var (avoids shell escaping issues)
            [ -n "$FEEDBACK" ] && ARGS="$ARGS --feedback \"$FEEDBACK\""
            [ "$DRY_RUN" = "true" ] && ARGS="$ARGS --dry-run"
            [ "$AUTO_MODE" = "true" ] && ARGS="$ARGS --auto-mode"
            kody-engine $CMD $ARGS
          fi

      - name: Pipeline summary
        if: always()
        run: |
          TASK_ID="${{ github.event.inputs.task_id || needs.parse.outputs.task_id }}"
          STATUS_FILE=".kody/tasks/${TASK_ID}/status.json"
          if [ -f "$STATUS_FILE" ]; then
            STATE=$(jq -r '.state' "$STATUS_FILE")
            ICON="❌"
            [ "$STATE" = "completed" ] && ICON="✅"
            echo "## ${ICON} Kody Pipeline: \`${TASK_ID}\`" >> $GITHUB_STEP_SUMMARY
            echo "" >> $GITHUB_STEP_SUMMARY
            echo "**Status:** ${STATE}" >> $GITHUB_STEP_SUMMARY
            echo "" >> $GITHUB_STEP_SUMMARY
            echo "| Stage | State |" >> $GITHUB_STEP_SUMMARY
            echo "|-------|-------|" >> $GITHUB_STEP_SUMMARY
            for stage in taskify plan build verify review review-fix ship; do
              SSTATE=$(jq -r ".stages[\"$stage\"].state // \"—\"" "$STATUS_FILE")
              case "$SSTATE" in
                completed) SICON="✅" ;;
                failed)    SICON="❌" ;;
                timeout)   SICON="⏱" ;;
                running)   SICON="▶️" ;;
                *)         SICON="○" ;;
              esac
              echo "| ${stage} | ${SICON} ${SSTATE} |" >> $GITHUB_STEP_SUMMARY
            done
          fi

      - name: Upload artifacts
        if: always()
        uses: actions/upload-artifact@v4
        continue-on-error: true
        with:
          name: kody-tasks-${{ github.event.inputs.task_id || needs.parse.outputs.task_id }}
          path: .kody/tasks/
          retention-days: 3

  # ─── Close Issue on PR Merge ────────────────────────────────────────────────
  close-issue-on-merge:
    if: >-
      github.event_name == 'pull_request' &&
      github.event.pull_request.merged == true
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
    permissions:
      issues: write
    steps:
      - name: Generate App token
        id: app-token
        if: vars.KODY_APP_ID != ''
        uses: actions/create-github-app-token@v1
        with:
          app-id: ${{ vars.KODY_APP_ID }}
          private-key: ${{ secrets.APP_PRIVATE_KEY }}
          repositories: ${{ github.event.repository.name }}

      - name: Close linked issue
        uses: actions/github-script@v7
        with:
          github-token: ${{ steps.app-token.outputs.token || secrets.GITHUB_TOKEN }}
          script: |
            // Extract issue number from branch name (e.g. "42-feature-name")
            const branch = context.payload.pull_request.head.ref;
            const match = branch.match(/^(\d+)-/);
            if (!match) return;
            const issueNumber = parseInt(match[1], 10);

            // Verify the issue exists and is open
            try {
              const { data: issue } = await github.rest.issues.get({
                owner: context.repo.owner,
                repo: context.repo.repo,
                issue_number: issueNumber,
              });
              if (issue.state === 'closed') return;
              if (issue.pull_request) return; // Skip if it's a PR, not an issue

              await github.rest.issues.update({
                owner: context.repo.owner,
                repo: context.repo.repo,
                issue_number: issueNumber,
                state: 'closed',
                state_reason: 'completed',
              });
              core.info(`Closed issue #${issueNumber} after PR #${context.payload.pull_request.number} was merged`);
            } catch (e) {
              core.warning(`Could not close issue #${issueNumber}: ${e.message}`);
            }

  # ─── Error Notifications ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────
  notify-parse-error:
    if: >-
      github.event_name == 'issue_comment' &&
      needs.parse.outputs.valid != 'true' &&
      (contains(github.event.comment.body, '@kody') || contains(github.event.comment.body, '/kody'))
    needs: [parse]
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
    steps:
      - uses: actions/github-script@v7
        with:
          script: |
            await github.rest.issues.createComment({
              owner: context.repo.owner,
              repo: context.repo.repo,
              issue_number: context.issue.number,
              body: '❌ Failed to parse command.\n\nUsage: `@kody [full|rerun|fix|fix-ci|review|resolve|status] [--from <stage>] [--feedback "<text>"]`'
            })

  notify-orchestrate-error:
    if: failure() && needs.orchestrate.result == 'failure'
    needs: [orchestrate]
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
    steps:
      - uses: actions/github-script@v7
        with:
          script: |
            const issueNumber = Number('${{ github.event.inputs.issue_number || needs.parse.outputs.issue_number || 0 }}');
            if (issueNumber > 0) {
              await github.rest.issues.createComment({
                owner: context.repo.owner,
                repo: context.repo.repo,
                issue_number: issueNumber,
                body: `❌ Pipeline failed. [View logs](${context.serverUrl}/${context.repo.owner}/${context.repo.repo}/actions/runs/${context.runId})`
              });
            }

  # ─── Fix-CI Auto-trigger (workflow_run trigger) ─────────────────────────────
  fix-ci-trigger:
    if: >-
      github.event_name == 'workflow_run' &&
      github.event.workflow_run.conclusion == 'failure' &&
      github.event.workflow_run.event == 'pull_request' &&
      github.event.workflow_run.pull_requests[0]
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
    timeout-minutes: 5
>>>>>>> origin/main
    permissions:
      issues: write
      pull-requests: write
      contents: write
    steps:
      - uses: actions/checkout@v4
        with:
          fetch-depth: 0
          token: ${{ secrets.KODY_TOKEN || github.token }}

      - uses: actions/setup-node@v4
        with:
          node-version: 22

      - name: Write pip cache key for LiteLLM
        run: echo "litellm[proxy]" > .kody-pip-requirements.txt

      - uses: actions/setup-python@v5
        with:
          python-version: '3.12'
          cache: 'pip'
          cache-dependency-path: .kody-pip-requirements.txt

      - env:
          ALL_SECRETS: ${{ toJSON(secrets) }}
          SESSION_ID: ${{ inputs.sessionId }}
          INIT_MESSAGE: ${{ inputs.message }}
          MODEL: ${{ inputs.model }}
          DASHBOARD_URL: ${{ inputs.dashboardUrl }}
        run: |
          if [ -n "$SESSION_ID" ]; then
            npx -y -p @kody-ade/kody-engine@latest kody chat
          else
            npx -y -p @kody-ade/kody-engine@latest kody ci
          fi
